title: August 3rd, 2021 (2)
body:
-  #akabilly
    - #legs noisy while sitting at the theater #symptoms
- #professional
    - there's only one thing and it's made of string lyrics
        - there's only one thing
        - and it's made of string
        - so when the ball bounce
        - the whole st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]s to sing
        - you're a song in someone else's mouth
        - but if you didn't exist they couldn't belt it out
        - don't worry about who's in charge of you
        - there's a charge in you
        - make connections you can circuit through
        - you got work to do
        - you got bolts to screw
        - into the sky with a nervous crew
        - saying good bye to the only e[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]h we ever knew
        - thought we were so clever too
        - survived every door we've been stepping through
        - how much could it hurt when i get to you
        - oh well
        - only time'll tell
        - i walk the line
        - cuz it's fine as hell
        - breathe in breathe out
        - and remind myself
        - it's my project
        - but i didn't assign myself
        - i see now
        - i don't gotta find myself
        - i be now
        - even when i'm beside myself
        - hey now
        - look but don't touch
        - lay down
        - you don't have to carry so much
        - way down
        - things you can't bear to bring up
        - play out
        - right in front of your face
